wins: Revenue exceeded $2 billion for the first time in company history
8.6% sales growth, highest yearly growth since early 2023
Contract signings increased to 11.2% growth, outperforming expectations
Customer site performance improved with 11.6% revenue growth
Operating margin reached 21%, up 80 basis points year-over-year
risks: Tariff-related uncertainties impacting supply chain and pricing
Inventory growth may remain elevated due to tariffs and inflation
Potential for lower gross margin in the second half of the year
Uncertainty around trade policy impact on demand in 2025
